bodyText: Home Files Chats Automations Space Skills More Bookmarks Settings Bookmarks Quick access to your bookmarked tabs and recent files Chats Automations Space Skills Settings ⣽ Civil Engineer Agent #96 Ready for Tasks Assistant Denies Aerospace Engineer Role Identity correction and role clarification discussion Mechanical Engineer Agent #95 Confirmation Chemical Engineer Agent #93 Role Confirmation Zo Computer Refuses Role Adoption Prompt Zo Rejects Space Agent Role Assignment Identity Confusion Climate Scientist Request Quantum Computing Researcher Agent Role Confirmation New Export You are a Quantum Computing Researcher Agent. Confirm your role: Quantum Computing Researcher Agent #87. Wait for tasks from the parent recruiter agent. Thoughts Zo • MiniMax 2.7 about 11 hours ago Quantum Computing Researcher Agent #87 confirmed. Standing by for tasks from the parent recruiter agent. Zo is thinking. Press Esc to stop. Reply... MiniMax 2.7* Send Command Palette Search for a command to run... Command Palette Search for a command to run… Go to File Search for files by name
